seo.title: How to Build a Wealth-Ready Portfolio | Vijai Mantri Part 2 |EP 15
seo.description: In Part 2 of this insightful conversation with Vijai Mantri, we go deep into the practical side of long-term investing: ✅ Asset Allocation myths and

takeaways: Asset allocation gets treated as more story than system, so the episode separates the common myths from what actually holds up in a real portfolio.
For retirement, Vijai Mantri argues equity is non-negotiable, not an optional add-on you can skip once you feel cautious.
Pairing a SIP with a term plan is offered as a practical way to invest toward specific goals while keeping your family protected.
IPOs and NFOs are where FOMO does the most damage, and the conversation frames them as traps to sidestep rather than events to chase.
Knowing when to exit a mutual fund, and why ESOPs trigger emotional mistakes, gets treated as a skill you build, not a gut call you wing.
